CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Motion To Seal
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ZYNGA INC.'S Motion To Seal.

Plaintiff Zynga Inc.'s motion to seal portions of exhibit A to its complaint is granted. Zynga has met the requirements for sealing per CRC 2.550. The court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
